Description_ENTITYBEHAVIOR_MAXEXPTONEXTM: The magic experience multiplier. This is calculated as Math.Pow(<max exp mana>, <config option> - (<max exp mana> * 0.0005)). [Default: 1.35d, Min: 0.01d, Max: 10d (Why would you do this???)]
Description_ENTITYBEHAVIOR_MAXMANA_START: The staring base player max mana. This is calculated by this variable + 1 player mana by default for the true starting mana. [Default: 9, Min: 1, Max: ???]
Description_ENTITYBEHAVIOR_MAXMANA_TOTAL: The maximum achievable player max mana. [Default: 9999, Min: 10, Max: ???]
Description_CAN_SPELL_FAILURE_EXPLOSION_: Can spell failure explosions affect blocks? [Default: true] (True = Blocks can be placed/destroyed on non-claimed land.) | (False = No blocks can be placed/destroyed.)
Can spell failure explosions affect entities? [Default: true] (True = Entities can be damaged on non-claimed land.) | (False = No entity damage.)
Description_ENTITYBEHAVIOR_MEDITATION_TI: Amount of time needed to activate 'Meditation' after sitting, in seconds. [Default: 7, Min: 1, Max: 60]
Description_MEDITATIONINSIGHT_RESEARCHTI: Amount of time needed to research a block with 'Mediation Insight', in seconds. [Default: 5, Min: 1, Max: 60]
Description_UNLOCKMAGIC_MINIMUMSTABILITY: Minimum amount of 'temporal stability' required to use a 'rusty dust' to unlock magic. [Default: 0.10f, Min: 0.01f, Max: 0.99f]
Description_RIFTACTIVITY_FORCENEWPATTERN: Should the rift activity change when trying to create a rift using magic? [Default: true]
Description_RIFTACTIVITY_FORCESPECIFICPA: Sets the rift activity pattern. Only used if rift activity changes when trying to create a rift using magic is 'true'. [Default: 1, (0 = calm) | (1 = low) | (2 = medium) | (3 = high) | (4 = apocalyptic)]
Description_COLORBLIND_MODE: Enables colorblind mode for some parts of the mod. [Default: false]
Description_REDUCEDPARTICLES_MODE: Enables the reduced particles mode which restricts particle spawn rates for this mod only. [Default: false]
Description_HUD_MANABAR_POSITION: Sets the position of the mana/magic exp bars in the HUD. [Default: 0 = On top of health bar, 1 = On top of satiety bar, 2 = On top of satiety bar higher up, 3 = Compatibility with 'HudUI' mod.]
Description_HUD_EFFECTSLIST_POSITION: Sets the default position of the 'effects list' in the HUD. [Default: 0 = Middle left of the game window, 1 = Top left of the game window, 2 = Top center of the game window]
Description_ITEM_LEYLINERESONATOR_CONNEC: Maximum connection distance between magic stations, in blocks. [Default: 30, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_ESSENCELACRIMA_MAXESSEN: Maximum amount of essence an 'essence lacrima' can hold? [Default: 50000, Min: 100, Max: 9999999?]
Description_ITEM_MANALACRIMA_TIER1_MAXMA: Maximum amount of mana a tier 1 'mana lacrima' can hold? [Default: 200, Min: 1, Max: 9999999?]
Description_ITEM_MANALACRIMA_TIER2_MAXMA: Maximum amount of mana a tier 2 'mana lacrima' can hold? [Default: 1000, Min: 1, Max: 9999999?]
Description_ITEM_MANALACRIMA_TIER3_MAXMA: Maximum amount of mana a tier 3 'mana lacrima' can hold? [Default: 5000, Min: 1, Max: 9999999?]
Description_ITEM_RIFTBLOOMSEED_DROPRATE: The percent chance a riftbloom seed will drop when breaking unstable riftblooms. [Default: 20, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_RIFTBLOOMSEED_RIFTANCHO: The percent chance a riftbloom seed will drop when breaking unstable riftblooms created from a rift anchor. [Default: 50, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_RIFTBLOOMSEED_DROPRATE_: The percent chance a riftbloom seed will drop when harvesting a riftbloom with a knife. [Default: 75, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_RIFTBLOOMSEED_TRANSMUTA: The percent chance a riftbloom seed will drop when harvesting a riftbloom with the spell 'Transmutation'. [Default: 95, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_SMALLRUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a small rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation I' on unstable small rust crystals. [Default: 33, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_LARGERUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a large rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation I' on unstable large rust crystals. [Default: 0, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_SMALLRUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a small rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation II' on unstable small rust crystals. [Default: 66, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_LARGERUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a large rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation II' on unstable large rust crystals. [Default: 33, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_SMALLRUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a small rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation III' on unstable small rust crystals. [Default: 100, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEM_LARGERUSTCRYSTAL_TRANSM: The percent chance a large rust crystal will drop when casting 'Transmutation III' on unstable large rust crystals. [Default: 66, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_BLOCK_DEVOURINGVOID_IGNOREEN: Any entities with health above this value are ignored by the 'devouring void' block. [Default: 50f, Min: 1f, Max: 9999f]
Any 'entity registery names' in this list are ignored by the 'devouring void' block.
Description_BLOCK_DEVOURINGVOID_HPTOESSE: The amount of essence gained from 1 HP lost by an entity in the 'Devouring Void' with no runestones. [Default: 1, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
The amount of essence gained from 1 HP lost by an entity in the 'Devouring Void' with tier 1 runestones. [Default: 1, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
The amount of essence gained from 1 HP lost by an entity in the 'Devouring Void' with tier 2 runestones. [Default: 1, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
The amount of essence gained from 1 HP lost by an entity in the 'Devouring Void' with tier 3 runestones. [Default: 2, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
The amount of essence gained from 1 HP lost by an entity in the 'Devouring Void' with tier 4 runestones. [Default: 3, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Description_BLOCK_UTILITY_BURNTIMEAMOUNT: Amount of burn time gained from using rusty dust on any utility block, in minutes. [Default: 5, Min: 1, Max: 60]
Amount of burn time gained from using the spell 'Transmutation' on any utility block, in minutes. [Default: 20, Min: 1, Max: 60]
Description_ITEM_GRIMOIRE_DURABILITYLOSS: Should 'sanctum' socketed grimoires lose durability on player death? [Default: true]
Minimum amount of durability 'sanctum' socketed grimoires lose on player death? [Default: 5, Min: 0, Max: 100]
Maximum amount of durability 'sanctum' socketed grimoires lose on player death? [Default: 20, Min: 0, Max: 100]
Description_BLOCK_ANCIENTARTIFACT_SPAWNR: How frequent 'unstable ancient artifacts' will spawn in rifts? This rng gets triggered once every 30s.  [Default: 150, Min: 2, Max: 9999+]
Description_ITEMSPELLSCROLL_BASE_CASTTIM: Base 'cast time' for using a spell scroll? [Default: 0f, Min: 0f, Max: 60f (0f = original spell cast time | 1f+ = static cast time in seconds.)]
Base modifier applied to the 'cast time' of a tier 1 spell scroll? [Default: 1.0f, Min: 0.01f, Max: 10f (0.5f = 50% cast time | 1.0f = original cast time | 2.0f = 200% cast time)]
Base modifier applied to the 'cast time' of a tier 2 spell scroll? [Default: 1.0f, Min: 0.01f, Max: 10f (0.5f = 50% cast time | 1.0f = original cast time | 2.0f = 200% cast time)]
Base modifier applied to the 'cast time' of a tier 3 spell scroll? [Default: 1.0f, Min: 0.01f, Max: 10f (0.5f = 50% cast time | 1.0f = original cast time | 2.0f = 200% cast time)]
Description_ITEMSPELLSCROLL_COST_GRIMOIR: The amount of grimoire durability that is consumed when duplicating a tier 1 spell? [Default: 15, Min: 0, Max: 100]
The amount of grimoire durability that is consumed when duplicating a tier 2 spell? [Default: 30, Min: 0, Max: 100]
The amount of grimoire durability that is consumed when duplicating a tier 3 spell? [Default: 45, Min: 0, Max: 100]
Description_ITEMSPELLSCROLL_COST_CREATIO: Base 'cast time' needed when creating a spell scroll? [Default: 15f, Min: 1f, Max: 60f]
Description_ITEMSPELLSCROLL_BASE_MAXDURA: Base 'max durability' a tier 1 spell scroll has? [Default: 8, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Base 'max durability' a tier 2 spell scroll has? [Default: 4, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Base 'max durability' a tier 3 spell scroll has? [Default: 2, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Description_ITEMCRYSTALLIZEDMEMORY_BASE_: Base 'magic experiance' gain for using a crystallized memory, in percent? [Default: 0.10f, Min: 0.01f, Max: 1.0f]
Description_BLOCK_TALISMANOFWARDING_DURA: Duration a 'talisman of warding' lasts, in seconds? [Default: 3600, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Description_BLOCK_TALISMANOFGRACE_DURATI: Duration a 'talisman of grace' lasts, in seconds? [Default: 3600, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Description_BLOCK_TALISMANOFRESONANCE_DU: Duration a 'talisman of resonance' lasts, in seconds? [Default: 3600, Min: 1, Max: 9999+]
Description_BLOCK_RIFTBLOOM_GROWTHSPELLI: Does the 'Growth' spells effect riftblooms? [Default: false]
Description_LOCK_ALL_MAGIC_TO_RUSTMAGE_O: Should all magic be lock to the 'Rust Mage' class only? [Default: false]
Description_ENTITYBEHAVIOR_MAXEXPTONEXTM: The amount of bonus magic experience the 'Rust Mage' class has, based on the experience multiplier in percent? [Default: 5, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_ITEMSPELLSCROLL_RESTRICTEDTO: Should 'spell scrolls' only be used by players who unlock magic? [Default: false]
Description_BLOCK_TEMPORALMAGICRUNE_CONS: The percent chance an temporal magic rune will be consumed in magic arrays. [Default: 10, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_BLOCK_LIGHTNEUTRALDARK_MANAT: The percent chance a light, neutral, or dark manatorch will become an inert version in magic arrays. [Default: 100, Min: 1, Max: 100]
The percent chance a light, neutral, or dark manatorch will convert back into an inert version in magic arrays. [Default: 50, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_BLOCK_MANALANTERN_CONSUMPTIO: The percent chance a mana lantern will convert back into an inert mana lantern in magic arrays. [Default: 5, Min: 1, Max: 100]
Description_WORLDMAGIC_RITUALOFWORLDESSE: Amount of reagents needed to complete the 'Ritual of World Essence'. [Default: 4, Min: 1, Max: 64]
Description_WORLDMAGIC_RITUALOFPURIFICAT: Amount of reagents needed to complete the 'Ritual of Purification'. [Default: 12, Min: 1, Max: 64]

Description_MAGITRIX_RUNESTONETIER1_SMAL: The percent chance a small elemental crystal will be consumed when using a 'basic runestone' in a magitrix multiblock structure. [Default: 10, Min: 0, Max: 100]
Description_MAGITRIX_RUNESTONETIER1_LARG: The percent chance a large elemental crystal will be consumed when using a 'basic runestone' in a magitrix multiblock structure. [Default: 0, Min: 0, Max: 100]

Description_MAGITRIX_RUNESTONETIER2_LARG: The percent chance a large elemental crystal will be consumed when using a 'advanced runestone' in a magitrix multiblock structure. [Default: 10, Min: 0, Max: 100]

Description_MAGITRIX_RUNESTONETIER3_LARG: The percent chance a large elemental crystal will be consumed when using a 'mastercraft runestone' in a magitrix multiblock structure. [Default: 25, Min: 0, Max: 100]
Description_GATEWAY_ESSENCECOST_GLOBALMO: The percent modifier that is multiplied against the essence cost multiblock structure. [Default: 1.0f, Min: 0f, Max: 10.0f]
Description_MANAINFUSION_ITEMCREATIONTIM: The time it takes to complete mana infusion, in seconds. [Default: 5, Min: 1, Max: 60]
Description_MANAINFUSION_ITEMCREATIONCOS: The amount of mana that mana infusion will use to create a 'basic wand'. [Default: 10, Min: 1, Max: 9999]
